title: FEMA Chemical Hazard Shelter-in-Place Guide
description: Official FEMA guidance for sheltering during chemical hazard events. Instructions: go inside quickly, seal doors and windows with duct tape and plastic, turn off HVAC systems, avoid tap water until cleared. Also includes active shooter guidance following Run-Hide-Fight protocol.
shortDescription: FEMA chemical hazard and active threat shelter guidance
author: Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA)
